zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Appleton於1433年出生在英國素福爾可拉文哈姆時，她的父親John Appleton29歲，母親Margaret Welling20歲。她於大約1455年與Thomas Spring Jr.結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1504年在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉文哈姆享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: Appleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in all parts of England named Appleton, from Old English æppeltūn ‘orchard’ (literally ‘apple enclosure’). Apples were particularly important in the Middle Ages as a food for survival through the winter.
History: This surname was brought to North America in 1635 by Samuel Appleton, who migrated from Ipswich, England, to Ipswich, MA.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Appleton was born in 1433, in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, her father, John Appleton, was 29 and her mother, Margaret Welling, was 20. She married Thomas Spring Jr. about 1455. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1504, in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Appleton est née en 1433, à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Appleton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret Welling, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Spring Jr. environ 1455. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1504, à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Appletonが1433年にイギリススフォルクラベンハムで生まれた時，父John Appletonは29歳，母Margaret Wellingは20歳であった。約1455年にThomas Spring Jr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1504年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラベンハムで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Appleton(이)가 1433년 영국 수폴크 레이븐함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Appleton(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Welling(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1455년 Thomas Spring Jr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1504년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 레이븐함에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Appleton родилась в 1433 г. в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Appleton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Welling, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Spring Jr. около 1455 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1504 г. в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.
